Place name: Andrée Strindberg Frænkel Memorial
Location: NORWAY
Description: Here ended one of the most ambitious North Pole expeditions in Arctic history.
Place URL: [86-107]

Place name: Jim Murray Memorial
Location: NEWMAINS, SCOTLAND
Description: This bronze statue pays tribute to a Scottish professional boxer, who tragically died following a championship fight.
Place URL: [86-70]

Place name: Fuente de los Tres Sombreros
Location: BÉCAL, MEXICO
Description: This hat-shaped fountain pays tribute to a centuries-old textile tradition in the Yucatán Peninsula.
Place URL: [86-1238]

Place name: Klerksdorp Spheres
Location: OTTOSDAL, SOUTH AFRICA
Description: Tiny pyrophyllite spheres from 3 billion years ago.
Place URL: [86-1289]

Place name: John Duigan Monument
Location: MIA MIA, AUSTRALIA
Description: Dedicated to the first flight of an aircraft to be designed and built in Australia.
Place URL: [86-1340]
